notes: Domains that aggregate/republish content without original reporting, SEO farms, or social reposts. Expand during collection.

notes_on_exclusions.rt.com_sputnikglobe.com_presstv.ir: State-funded outlets with documented disinformation history; excluded to avoid contaminating reference articles. Still useful as framing reference in datasheets when discussing bias.
notes_on_exclusions.dailymail.co.uk: Tabloid with frequent factual issues; excluded per WP:DAILYMAIL-style editorial consensus.
